command:
for ip in 192.168.0.191 192.168.0.192 192.168.0.198 192.168.0.199 192.168.0.200 192.168.0.201 192.168.0.202 192.168.0.203; do echo -n "$ip: "; ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=5 jose@$ip "hostname && uptime | awk '{print $3,$4,$5}'" 2>&1 | tr "
" " "; echo; done
